headline: 3 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership And 79% Revenue Growth
summary: The market remained flat over the last week but has shown a robust 27% increase over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 17% annually. In this context, identifying growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often indicate strong confidence from those closest to the business and have shown impressive revenue growth.

headline: Zeta Global, The Trade Desk, and AppLovin Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the 10-year Treasury yield climbed to 4.687%, the highest since January 2025, sharply increasing the discount rate the market applies to long-duration software revenue.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
